leagueMatchEvent.name: Duel of Dynamic Duos
leagueMatchEvent.desc: See what you can do as a duo!
leagueMatchEvent.regulation:
Team chemistry is the name of the game in fast-paced two vs. two battles!

・ Explore new strategies as you try to become the top team on the map!
・ Respawn time will be shortened!
・ You can participate as a team of 2 or solo.
・ Both primary and secondary abilities will be enabled!

leagueMatchEvent.name: Too Many Trizookas!
leagueMatchEvent.regulation:
Can you defeat a Trizooka user with a Trizooka of your own?! Now's the time to find out!

・ You can only use weapons that come with the Trizooka special.
・ The special gauge will fill quickly all by itself!
・ Only primary gear abilities will be enabled! Secondary abilities will have no effect.
